# OpenTelemetry logging integration

{{ pypi }}

## Installation

```
pip install opentelemetry-instrumentation-logging
```

## References

- [OpenTelemetry logging integration](https://opentelemetry-python-contrib.readthedocs.io/en/latest/instrumentation/logging/logging.html)
- [OpenTelemetry Project](https://opentelemetry.io/)
- [OpenTelemetry Python Examples](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-python/tree/main/docs/examples)
